$comment: Defines the structural contract for baseline.json — the frozen quality snapshot emitted after all grinder passes complete. The deferred_findings_ref field contains a relative path from the project root to the deferred-findings.json file (e.g., docs/grinder/deferred-findings.json), linking the baseline to its companion deferred-findings audit trail defined by deferred-findings.schema.json. Validation boundary: this schema enforces structural correctness (field types, ranges, required fields). Semantic validation — such as verifying the referenced deferred-findings file exists or that tool_versions keys match the manifest — belongs in validate-plan.py --schema (Phase 1, schema-validators task).
